entry.title: New: CC 24-20 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCILMEMBER RAWLINS-FERNANDEZ, transmitting a proposed amendment to Resolution 24-99, entitled "PROPOSING AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLE 8 OF THE REVISED CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF MAUI (1983), AS AMENDED, TO MAKE THE SALARY COMMISSION’S AUTHORITY CONSISTENT WITH THE CONSTITUTION OF THE STATE OF HAWAIʻI"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
